title: Prepared statement rel_bin.c:2378: rel2bin_project: Assertion `0' failed.
poc: create table foo (a int, b int);
select count(b) from (select a,b from foo union all select null,null from foo) t;
key_bug_features: Using UNION ALL with NULL values in subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (x int, y varchar(50), z date);
INSERT INTO bar (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO bar (x, y, z) VALUES (2, NULL, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(y) FROM (SELECT x, y FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL FROM bar) t;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT x FROM bar WHERE y IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT NULL FROM bar) t;
